about.title: About
about.description:
React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript developer, focused on front-end and modern web experiences.
I build performant and coherent interfaces, with a practice, product and user impact centered approach.

My work is based on concrete projects, designed to be useful, visible and truly differentiated.

  To discover:
ronanchenu.vercel.app

Outside of development, I draw inspiration from sports, music and moments shared with friends.
